message:
fix: clean up temp files on error in write_atomic_file and rewrite_wal_sidecar

write_atomic_file: wrap I/O operations in a closure and remove the temp
file if any step fails, preventing orphaned .tmp.{pid} files.

rewrite_wal_sidecar: remove the tmp WAL file if append_wal_batch fails
mid-write, preventing orphaned partial WAL sidecars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
